zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Fuller於1605年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可托普可洛福特時，她的父親Roger Fuller33歲，母親Jane Gowan26歲。她於1622年8月22日與John Dean結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1669年1月25日在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托享年64歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Fuller于1605年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可托普可洛福特时，她的父亲Roger Fuller33岁，母亲Jane Gowan26岁。她于1622年8月22日与John Dean结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1669年1月25日在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托享年64岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Fuller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dresser of cloth, from Middle English fuller ‘fuller of cloth’ (partly from Old English fullere, partly from Old French fouleor, foleur, Latin fullo). Raw cloth had to be fulled, i.e. scoured, cleansed, and thickened by beating or trampling it in water, a process also known as walking or tucking, hence the surnames Walker and Tucker alongside Fuller. These three terms and surnames are characteristic of different parts of England. In general, in Middle English, Fuller is southern and eastern, while Walker belongs to the west and north and Tucker is southwestern. Compare Fullen .
English: variant of Fullard with loss of -d.
German (Füller): occupational name for a person whose work involved filling, such as a dauber, or a nickname for a gourmand or glutton. Compare Filler .

variants.name: Walker
meanings: English (mainly North and Midlands) and Scottish: occupational name for a fuller, from Middle English walker, Old English wealcere (an agent derivative of wealcan ‘to walk, tread’), ‘one who trampled cloth in a bath of lye or kneaded it, in order to strengthen it’. This was the regular term for the occupation during the Middle Ages in western and northern England. Compare Fuller and Tucker . As a Scottish surname it has also been used as a translation of Gaelic Mac an Fhucadair ‘son of the fuller’. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

History: The name was brought to North America from northern England and Scotland independently by many different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Samuel Walker came to Lynn, MA, c. 1630; Philip Walker was in Rehoboth, MA, in or before 1643. The surname was also established in VA before 1650; a Thomas Walker, born in 1715 in King and Queen County, VA, was a physician, soldier, and explorer.

variants.name: Filler
meanings: South German: occupational name for a flayer or skinner, from Middle High German viller ‘knacker’, from villen ‘to skin’.

variants.name: Fullen
meanings: English: occupational name for a fuller (see Fuller ), from Old French fulun ‘fuller’.
English (Lancashire): branch of this family in Lancashire probably represents a variant of Fulham (see Fullam ), reintroduced from Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Fuller was born in 1605, in Topcroft, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Fuller, was 33 and her mother, Jane Gowan, was 26. She married John Dean on 22 August 1622. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 25 January 1669, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 64, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Fuller est née en 1605, à Topcroft, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Fuller, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jane Gowan, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Dean le 22 août 1622. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 janvier 1669, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Fuller 1605 in Topcroft, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Fuller 33 und ihre Mutter Jane Gowan 26. Sie hat am 22. August 1622 John Dean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Januar 1669 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Fuller è nata il nel 1605 nel Topcroft, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Fuller, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Jane Gowan, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Dean il 22 agosto 1622. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1669, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Fullerが1605年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクトプクロフトで生まれた時，父Roger Fullerは33歳，母Jane Gowanは26歳であった。1622年8月22日にJohn Deanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1669年1月25日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンで64歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Fuller(이)가 1605년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 토p크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Fuller(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Gowan(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1622년 8월 22일 John Dean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1669년 1월 25일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Fuller nasceu em 1605, em Topcroft, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Fuller, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jane Gowan, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Dean em 22 de agosto de 1622. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1669, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Fuller родилась в 1605 г. в местности топкрофт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Fuller было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Gowan, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Dean 22 августа 1622 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 25 января 1669 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Fuller nació en 1605, en Topcroft, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Fuller, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Jane Gowan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Dean el 22 de agosto de 1622. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1669, en Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
